objective: Plan the sovereign-local terminal selected journey from package and exact-effect authority through result, delta, export, faults, and offline reconstruction.
falsifiable_claim: An independent operator can complete the selected local journey while substitution, revocation, stale fencing, rollback, and retry yield zero unauthorized or duplicate final invocations.
exit_criteria: An independent operator completes package-to-effect-to-export with the selected local authority path.
Substitution, revocation, stale fence, rollback, and retry yield zero unauthorized or duplicate final invocations and offline reconstruction passes.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M9_SOVEREIGN_LOCAL_TERMINAL_JOURNEY_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Substitute principal, session, System, package, intent, grant, resource, effect, fence, result, delta, export, and temporal evidence; inject restart, rollback, revocation, timeout, and retry.
remaining_nonclaims: No portable delegation, managed lane, multi-node, federation, physical action, or public settlement.
No M9 claim or stage closure without committed terminal evidence.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
